member.name: M:PlusStudioLevelFormat.BaldiLevel.#ctor(PlusStudioLevelFormat.ByteVector2)
member.summary: Creates a new level that is properly initialized with the specified width and height

member.name: M:PlusStudioLevelFormat.BaldiLevel.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an uninitialized level. Call .Initialize before attempting to access cells or other such data!

member.name: M:PlusStudioLevelFormat.BaldiLevel.Initialize(PlusStudioLevelFormat.ByteVector2)
member.summary: Initializes the cells for the specified BaldiLevel
